title: EULA
body: Standard. Trial = full features for 2 hours, resettable with a gateway restart. Maker Edition is free forever for non-commercial use.
code:
License options:
  Trial:    Full features, 2hr reset timer
  Standard: Perpetual license, purchased
  Maker:    Free, non-commercial, limited
  Edge:     Lightweight, limited tags

Trial resets every gateway restart.
No credit card needed for trial.
key: Trial = full features, 2hr timer, restart to reset
You do NOT need a license to learn
mistakes: Thinking you need to buy a license to learn
